feedback.text: For years payment providers have not cared what kind of video games I decided to buy. Only recently after certain activist groups who do not care about the interests of consumers targeted payment processors and told them to threaten independent video game providers to pull games from their websites and apps the activist groups deem immoral. For if they do not the payment processors will cease their services. Payment processors should not be able to morally dictate what I can and cannot legally spend my money on, be that video games or something else.
